patch_title: Patch 7.35 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

new_content.name: Pilgrim's Traverse
new_content.description: A new deep dungeon challenging parties of one to four players with an ever-changing landscape.

new_content.name: The Windward Wilds
new_content.description: A new 8-player trial, part of the Monster Hunter Wilds crossover event.
new_content.npc_location: Dawn Hunt Tracker at Tuliyollal (X:13.3 Y:13.1)

new_content.name: The Windward Wilds (Extreme)
new_content.description: An extreme difficulty version of The Windward Wilds trial.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures
new_content.description: New side story quests continuing the Hildibrand saga.

new_content.name: Yok Huy Allied Society Quests
new_content.description: New crafter-focused allied society quests with main and daily quests.

housing.name: New orchestrion rolls
housing.description: New musical arrangements for your orchestrion.

glamour.name: New Hairstyle (Design Contest Entry)
glamour.description: A new hairstyle inspired by an FFXIV Hairstyle Design Contest entry.
